---
title: "Crowd sourced vs centralised data for transport planning: A case study of bicycle path data in the UK"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2015). Crowd sourced vs centralised data for transport planning: A case study of bicycle path data in the UK. *GIS Research UK(GISRUK). Leeds. http://leeds. Gisruk. Org/abstracts/GISRUK2015_submission_71. pdf*."
date: "2015-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_crowd_2015"
citation-type: "paper-conference"
citation-type-label: "Conference Paper"
venue: "GIS Research UK(GISRUK). Leeds. http://leeds. Gisruk. Org/abstracts/GISRUK2015_submission_71. pdf"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Conference Paper
**Venue:** GIS Research UK(GISRUK). Leeds. http://leeds. Gisruk. Org/abstracts/GISRUK2015_submission_71. pdf
**Year:** 2015

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2015). Crowd sourced vs centralised data for transport planning: A case study of bicycle path data in the UK. *GIS Research UK(GISRUK). Leeds. http://leeds. Gisruk. Org/abstracts/GISRUK2015_submission_71. pdf*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@inproceedings{lovelace_crowd_2015,
  title = {Crowd Sourced vs Centralised Data for Transport Planning: A Case Study of Bicycle Path Data in the {{UK}}},
  booktitle = {{{GIS Research UK}}({{GISRUK}}). {{Leeds}}. {{http://leeds.}} Gisruk. Org/Abstracts/{{GISRUK2015}}\_submission\_71. Pdf},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin},
  year = {2015},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
